settings.headline:
Reliable Solutions for
Laboratory Support.
settings.subtext: Laboratory products and support solutions for analytical, reference, microbiology, chromatography, consumables, sample preparation, and daily laboratory operations.

settings.label: Who We Are
settings.heading: Saudi Arabia's Trusted Laboratory Supplier
settings.body: LABCON specializes in supplying laboratory support products in Saudi Arabia, with a focus on reliable sourcing, practical product selection, and responsive support for governmental, private, industrial, academic, and research laboratories.

settings.title: Reliable Sourcing
settings.text: Products sourced from verified, trusted manufacturers.

settings.title: B2B Product Catalog
settings.text: Browse and request a quote — no retail checkout.

settings.title: Responsive Support
settings.text: Technical and commercial support for inquiries and tenders.

settings.label: Product Portfolio
settings.heading: Two Product Families. One Trusted Supplier.
settings.subtext: LABCON organizes its catalog into two focused product families to help you find exactly what your laboratory needs.

settings.label: How It Works
settings.heading: Request a Quote in Four Steps

settings.title: Browse the Catalog
settings.text: Explore our full product portfolio by category or search by product name, SKU, or brand.

settings.title: Add to Quote List
settings.text: Select the products you need and add them to your Quote List with the required quantities.

settings.title: Submit Request
settings.text: Enter your contact and organization details, then submit your quote request to LABCON.

settings.title: LABCON Responds
settings.text: Our team reviews your request and contacts you with availability, pricing, and lead time.

settings.label: Who We Serve
settings.heading: Supporting Laboratories Across Saudi Arabia
settings.subtext: LABCON serves a wide range of laboratory sectors with reliable product sourcing and responsive support.

settings.title: Reliable product sourcing
settings.text: We source from verified, internationally trusted manufacturers with consistent quality records.

settings.title: B2B quote process — no retail checkout
settings.text: Our catalog is designed for institutional procurement. Browse freely, build a quote list, and submit.

settings.title: Tender and procurement support
settings.text: We assist with tender documentation, technical specifications, and commercial coordination.

settings.title: Technical and commercial expertise
settings.text: Our team provides application guidance and product selection support across all categories.

settings.title: Simplified access to laboratory products
settings.text: One trusted supplier for 12 product categories covering the full range of lab support needs.

settings.heading: Looking for a specific laboratory product?
settings.subtext: Submit a quote request — our team will respond with availability, pricing, and lead time.
